---
title: "Team 2"
---
## FILL IN ROLES (data cleaning, EDA, modeling, writing)
## Members
- Name 1 — Divya Spurthi Amancherla - data cleaning, EDA, data modeling
- Name 2 — Niya Kedir - Final Figure Generation
- Name 3 — Shubeeb Rudd - data acquisition, writing, final figure generation
- Name 4 — Sean Yoo - Final Figure Generation

## Collaboration rules (simple)
- Pull before you start work.
- Commit small changes with clear messages.
- Only one person edits the *same* `.qmd` file at a time.
- Use Issues (optional) for tasks/bugs.
